calc_traces.title: Storage inventory-day basis
calc_traces.formula: inventory days = (dispatch + operating stock + restart buffer) * turnaround buffer factor
calc_traces.notes: Operations planning now drives finished-product storage instead of a fixed weekly heuristic.
